steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between The Prophet and Those Barren Leaves. The relevant shared fact is that both books entered the public domain, though in different years.

steps.title: Avoid difference-focused details
steps.content: A emphasizes a timing difference, B discusses only Those Barren Leaves, and D contrasts genres instead of showing similarity. The correct sentence presents both books together and identifies their shared public-domain status. The answer is C.
